title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Fit test can be started for connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 via App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding section
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60, 60+, or 20 device is connected via Bluetooth.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap on App Settings (gear icon or menu option).
Scroll down and tap on User Guides.
Verify that the Fit test option is available and can be started for the currently connected device.
expected: The Fit test can be started for the currently connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device from App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding.
